Jurisdiction disclosure phrase growth

HK: Project Harbour contains inside information that is not generally known to persons accustomed to dealing before the SEHK announcement.
AU: Project Wattle contains price-sensitive information and remains not generally available before ASX release.
JP: Project Sakura includes undisclosed material fact and unpublished material information before TDnet timely disclosure.
KR: Project Han includes unpublished material information before KRX KIND and DART filing.
